_description: Resources found in AWS but not in Terraform state that should NOT trigger alerts or PRs. resource_type is the Terraform resource type (e.g. aws_security_group). resource_id_pattern is matched as a substring against the resource's identifier (name or ID). reason is mandatory — it documents why this resource is accepted outside of Terraform management.

_example.reason: Ephemeral SG created by EC2 Launch Wizard; does not need IaC management

_example_cost_cap._note: When max_monthly_cost_usd is set the resource is only suppressed if its estimated monthly cost is BELOW this threshold.  An expensive resource that matches the pattern still triggers an alert.
_example_cost_cap.reason: Suppress dev sandbox instances unless they cost over $10/mo
